codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)
codes.rationale: Heart failure as a complication of care represents iatrogenic/secondary heart failure, not primary heart failure.

codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung (disorder)
codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung represents secondary heart failure (pulmonary disease-induced), not primary heart failure.

Left ventricular failure with sepsis may represent secondary heart failure (sepsis-induced) rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether sepsis-associated LVF counts as 'primary'.

Right ventricular failure with sepsis may represent secondary heart failure (sepsis-induced) rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether sepsis-associated RVF counts as 'primary'.

summary: Recall: 78.6% (33 of 42 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 71.7%. F1: 75.0%. 2 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.

scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure is the direct instance of the queried condition.
Congestive heart failure is a specific subtype of heart failure and a direct instance of the queried condition.
Left ventricular failure is a specific manifestation of heart failure and a direct instance of the queried condition.
Heart failure, unspecified is a direct instance of the queried condition.
Chronic left-sided congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Acute heart failure is a primary clinical variant of heart failure representing an instance of the queried condition.
Chronic right-sided congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction is a primary clinical classification of heart failure based on ejection fraction.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with mid range ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with mid-range ejection fraction is a primary clinical classification of heart failure based on ejection fraction.
Heart failure (disorder) is the primary generic diagnosis code for the queried condition.
Left heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure representing a specific anatomical variant.
Chronic congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Biventricular congestive heart failure is a direct clinical subtype of heart failure with explicit condition naming.
Chronic right-sided heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and chronicity.
Acute congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with acute presentation.
Chronic left-sided heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and chronicity.
Right heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality.

scored_codes.term: Acute exacerbation of chronic heart failure
scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic heart failure is a clinical variant of primary heart failure representing disease progression.

scored_codes.term: Chronic combined systolic and diastolic heart failure (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Chronic combined systolic and diastolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristics.

scored_codes.term: Acute on chronic right-sided congestive heart failure (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Acute on chronic right-sided congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and temporal pattern.
Decompensated cardiac failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing acute decompensation.
Compensated cardiac failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing stable/compensated state.
Acute left ventricular failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality and acute presentation.
Refractory heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure representing a severe clinical variant resistant to treatment.
Right ventricular failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified laterality.
Congestive heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure due to left ventricular systolic dysfunction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congestive heart failure due to left ventricular systolic dysfunction is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional etiology.
Chronic systolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristics.
Chronic diastolic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristics.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with normal ejection fraction (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with normal ejection fraction is a direct instance of primary heart failure with specified functional characteristics.
Chronic heart failure is a direct instance of primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to coronary artery disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to coronary artery disease is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to myocarditis is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to cardiomyopathy (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to cardiomyopathy is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to heart valve disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure with reduced ejection fraction due to heart valve disease is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Low output heart failure due to and following Fontan operation (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Low output heart failure due to Fontan operation is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.
Heart failure due to thyrotoxicosis is a specific etiology-based subtype of heart failure.
Dilated cardiomyopathy is a specific subtype of cardiomyopathy that is a common cause of primary heart failure.
Obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy is a specific subtype of cardiomyopathy that can cause primary heart failure.
Other hypertrophic cardiomyopathy is a specific subtype of cardiomyopathy that can cause primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Left ventricular failure with normal ejection fraction due to valvular heart disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Left ventricular failure with normal ejection fraction due to valvular disease is a specific type of primary heart failure with identified etiology.

scored_codes.term: Right ventricular failure due to heart valve disorder (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to heart valve disorder is a specific type of primary heart failure with identified cardiac etiology.

scored_codes.term: Congestive heart failure due to valvular disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Congestive heart failure due to valvular disease is a specific type of primary heart failure with identified cardiac etiology.
Rheumatic left ventricular failure is a specific type of primary heart failure with identified rheumatic etiology.
Cardiomyopathy is a primary cardiac condition that directly causes heart failure and is a major etiology of primary heart failure.
Ischaemic cardiomyopathy is a type of cardiomyopathy caused by ischaemia; it may be considered a subtype of heart failure but the term does not explicitly name 'heart failure'.

Left ventricular failure with sepsis may represent secondary heart failure (sepsis-induced) rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether sepsis-associated LVF counts as 'primary'.

Right ventricular failure with sepsis may represent secondary heart failure (sepsis-induced) rather than primary heart failure; clinical judgment needed on whether sepsis-associated RVF counts as 'primary'.
Primary ovarian failure is an endocrine condition unrelated to heart failure; the term name does not contain 'heart' or 'failure'.
Heartburn is a gastrointestinal symptom unrelated to heart failure.
Injury of heart is trauma-related and distinct from primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Assessment using congestive heart failure, hypertension, age 75 years or older, diabetes mellitus and previous stroke or transient ischemic attack score (procedure)
scored_codes.rationale: This is a risk assessment procedure (CHA2DS2-VASc score), not a diagnosis or instance of heart failure itself.
This is an educational intervention procedure, not a diagnosis or instance of heart failure.
This is an administrative/management regime code for initial assessment, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
This is a monitoring regime/therapy code, not a diagnosis or instance of heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with renal failure
scored_codes.rationale: Hypertensive heart and renal disease with renal failure is unrelated to primary heart failure.
Chronic hepatic failure is an unrelated organ system failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Acute renal failure is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Other acute renal failure is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Hypoplastic right heart syndrome is a congenital structural abnormality, not an instance of primary heart failure itself.
Hypoplastic left heart syndrome is a congenital structural abnormality, not an instance of primary heart failure itself.
Abnormalities of heart beat are symptoms/signs that may accompany heart failure but do not represent heart failure itself.
Heart transplant failure is a complication of transplantation, not primary heart failure.
Heart-lung transplant failure is a complication of transplantation, not primary heart failure.
Heart transplant status is an administrative/status code, not a diagnosis of primary heart failure.
Congestive heart failure monitoring is a therapeutic regime/procedure, not a diagnosis of heart failure itself.
Referral to heart failure clinic is a procedural/administrative code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure review completed is an administrative/procedural situation code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure annual review is a therapeutic regime/procedure, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure medication review is a procedural code, not a diagnosis of heart failure.
Heart failure resolved is a past finding indicating absence of current heart failure, not an instance of active primary heart failure.

scored_codes.rationale: Hypertensive heart disease without heart failure is a comorbidity unrelated to primary heart failure.
Hypertensive heart and renal disease is a comorbidity, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Aneurysm of heart is a structural cardiac condition unrelated to primary heart failure.
Pulmonary valve insufficiency is a valvular condition that may cause heart failure but is not itself primary heart failure.
Acute respiratory failure is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Acute respiratory failure, Type I is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Acute respiratory failure, Type II is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.

Respiratory failure, unspecified is a complication of heart failure, not an instance of primary heart failure.
Double outlet left ventricle is a congenital cardiac anomaly, not an instance of primary heart failure.

scored_codes.term: Heart failure as a complication of care (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Heart failure as a complication of care represents iatrogenic/secondary heart failure, not primary heart failure.
Hypertensive heart disease is a comorbidity/risk factor for heart failure but is not itself an instance of primary heart failure.
Acute ischaemic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition that may cause heart failure but is not itself primary heart failure.
Chronic ischaemic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition that may cause heart failure but is not itself primary heart failure.
Atherosclerotic heart disease is a separate cardiac condition that may cause heart failure but is not itself primary heart failure.

scored_codes.rationale: Right ventricular failure due to disorder of lung represents secondary heart failure (pulmonary disease-induced), not primary heart failure.
